creator: lebel.jerome@gmail.com
text:
I tried to remove a snapshot. Then I had a kernel panic. Now each time I want to import my zpool again, I need to do zpool import -f storage. And this command always trigger a new kernel panic now.

I was not able to get the stack trace from the first kernel panic. So I have no clue if it was related or not. But anyway, now, I can't use my zpool anymore.

I will try to see if I can debug myself the kernel. Anybody is welcome to give me some help on that :-)
